description: Customer reports the Excel export button on the reports page produces an empty file. Affects all users on their account.
User resets password successfully but gets 'Invalid credentials' error when logging in with the new password. Intermittent — affects ~30% of resets.
Enterprise dashboard takes 15-20 seconds to load for accounts with >500 projects. Other accounts normal. Reproducible.
Customer sees two identical charges of £89 on their card statement dated 1 June. Only one active subscription on our end. Requires urgent investigation and refund.

issue_title: How do I add team members?
description: Customer asking how to invite colleagues. This is a Pro/Enterprise feature, not available on Starter. Needs polite explanation and upsell opportunity.

issue_title: API rate limit errors on bulk import
description: Customer hitting 429 errors when importing >200 records via API. Rate limit is 100 req/min but their use case requires burst of 500. Asking for enterprise tier exemption.

issue_title: SSO integration broken after our update
description: Enterprise SSO (Okta) stopped working after our 2 June deployment. Error: 'SAML assertion validation failed'. Affecting all 340 users at this account.
Account set to USD but invoices generating in GBP. Customer in US. Has been an issue since account creation 3 months ago — just noticed.
iOS app crashes on launch for users on iOS 18.4. Android unaffected. Approximately 200 reports from different customers.

issue_title: Need GDPR data export for audit
description: Customer's DPO requesting full data export for GDPR compliance audit. Need structured export of all personal data we hold for their users.
Password reset emails not being received. Customer checked spam. Issue reproducible — emails not appearing in our send logs either. Likely SMTP issue.
Salesforce connector returning null values for Opportunity.Amount field. Has been working for 6 months. Started 4 June. No changes on their side.

issue_title: Refund request — didn't use the product
description: Customer signed up 3 days ago, never logged in after first day. Requesting full refund. Outside 14-day refund window but marginal case.

issue_title: Reports show data from wrong date range
description: Date range filter on custom reports appears to be off by one day — selecting 'Last 30 days' includes day 31 and excludes today. Affects all custom reports.
UI shows 'Delete' button for archived projects but clicking it gives a 403 error. Customer wants to clean up their account.
Security settings page for 2FA setup returns a blank white page. Affects all users trying to set up authenticator apps. Console shows JS error.

issue_title: Bulk user import via CSV fails silently
description: Uploading user CSV file shows success message but no users are created. No error shown. Affects enterprise onboarding workflow — customer has 120 users to import.
Customer submitted cancellation on 28 May (within notice period) but was charged on 1 June for annual renewal (£1,068). Requesting immediate refund.
Main dashboard page loads indefinitely on Firefox 127. Chrome and Safari work fine. Reproducible by multiple users.
Slack integration connected successfully but task notifications not appearing in designated channel. Integration shows as active in settings.

issue_title: Account locked — too many failed logins
description: Admin account locked after automated monitoring script used wrong credentials repeatedly. Customer needs unlock + guidance on API key auth for scripts.
Customer added 3 seats on 5 June. Invoice shows 6 seats added — double charged. Amount: £174 excess. Screenshot provided.
PDF exports of reports come out blank — headers present but no data. Excel export works fine. Started after last week's update.

issue_title: Can't sign up — card keeps declining
description: Customer's Visa card being declined at checkout. Tried two different cards. Our Stripe logs show no attempt — may be a frontend issue.
Global search not returning exact matches — searching for project name 'Alpha Beta' returns 'Alpha' results but not 'Alpha Beta'.

issue_title: Need custom SLA — current response too slow
description: Customer escalating to their VP. Current SLA (8h response) not meeting their needs. Asking for 1h SLA. Needs account management involvement.

issue_title: App won't load on Chrome after update
description: After Chrome 126 update, our web app fails to load. Console error: 'Blocked by Content Security Policy'. Other browsers fine. Likely CSP header issue.
Invoice PDF shows old company name (acquired company name from 2024). Customer needs corrected invoice for accounting.
Customer asking what features they get on Pro vs Starter and whether they can trial Pro before committing.

issue_title: Login works but app shows wrong account
description: User logs in successfully but sees another user's data. Reports it happened twice. Serious data isolation issue — needs immediate investigation.
Enterprise payment gateway integration returning 500 errors on checkout. Affecting live transactions. Customer revenue at risk.
Google Calendar integration creating duplicate calendar entries. Each event appears 2-3 times. Started after user reconnected the integration.

issue_title: Data not loading after region migration
description: Customer's account migrated to EU region last week. Data appears missing but is likely in old region. Migration process may not have completed.

issue_title: Need audit log export for compliance
description: Legal team requires full audit log export (all user actions, data access events) for a regulatory audit. Format: CSV with timestamp, user, action, resource.
New signup can't verify email — verification link expired before they could click it. Default 24h expiry may be too short.
Refund approved by support on 31 May still not showing on customer's statement. 10 business days have passed. Stripe shows refund issued — bank delay?
Developer team struggling with OAuth2 implementation. Docs show API key auth only. Need OAuth2 code examples for Python and JavaScript.

issue_title: Export limit of 1000 rows too restrictive
description: Customer has 45,000 records but export caps at 1,000 rows. Requesting either higher limit or paginated export functionality.

issue_title: Mobile app not syncing with desktop
description: Data entered on mobile app not appearing on desktop within expected 5-minute sync window. Sometimes delayed 2-3 hours.
Admin trying to transfer account ownership to new person but 'Transfer Ownership' option is greyed out. Original owner has left the company.
